testcase.name: test_subscription_status_endpoint
test_plans_endpoint_returns_tiers

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 4 beneficiary tiers, got 0 assert 0 >= 4 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: tests/test_security_hardening.py:231: in test_plans_endpoint_returns_tiers assert len(beneficiary_tiers) >= 4, f"Expected 4 beneficiary tiers, got {len(beneficiary_tiers)}" E AssertionError: Expected 4 beneficiary tiers, got 0 E assert 0 >= 4 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_analytics_endpoint_works
testcase.failure: tests/test_security_hardening.py:251: in test_analytics_endpoint_works assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
